segments.text: [Speaker Notes] Chapter 1, Opener, Discovering new medicines requires comprehension of the structure and function of the drug target, whether that be an enzyme, a gene, or a signaling molecule. Success in drug discovery requires deep understanding of biochemistry and its allied disciplines.
